name: Calendar
description: AI-assisted scheduling with human-in-the-loop steering and interpretability.

defaultCalendarId.description: ID of the calendar to use for new events.

timezone.description: IANA timezone string; defaults to host application timezone.

steeringThresholds.description: Confidence thresholds that control how the steering panel handles proposals.

autoApprove.description: Proposals with confidence ≥ this value may skip explicit approval (green tier).

requireExplicit.description: Proposals with confidence < this value require explicit human approval (red tier).

warnBelow.description: Proposals with confidence < this value show an amber warning and top-2 influence factors.
